creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Ability to annotate, track, query and filter issues that affect more than one FreeBSD version.

Currently an issue can only be marked for a single version. Should we set the first one reported? the last one? the highest one? the broadest scope one?

* Reduce time spent trawling free text / comments to identify affected versions
* Implications for MFC automation, notifications, and post-commit validation
* Make it easier for bug hunters / triagers to find issues relevant to them
